overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a leather coat and hat walking through a foggy, rainy night in an industrial-era city. The scene features wet cobblestone streets illuminated by warm gas lamps, brick buildings, and a prominent electric company sign, creating a moody, atmospheric noir aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow foggy alley between high stone wall and brick industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy cobblestone path beside a high stone wall, approaching an iron gate

entered.detail: tall beige stone wall running along the left side of the narrow alley
multi-story brick buildings with illuminated windows lining the right side
black iron fence and gate posts embedded in the stone wall
warm yellow gas lamps illuminating the foggy street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, foggy cobblestone alley at night, flanked by a high stone wall on the left and brick industrial buildings on the right. Warm gas lamps glow in the distance through the mist, and the wet stones reflect the dim light.

scene_state.functional_zone: gated entrance to industrial street with prominent gas lamps

events.description: passing through the iron gate posts into a more open street area
rain begins to fall visibly, transitioning from fog to heavy rainfall

agents.ego_description: walking through the gate as rain begins to fall, passing close to a bright gas street lamp

entered.detail: ornate black gas lamp post with bright warm light and visible rain drops
large brick building with illuminated 'ELECTRIC' sign in bright bulbs

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the iron gate as the scene opens into a wider street. Rain begins to fall heavily, visible in the lamplight. The bright electric company sign becomes visible on the left as the character walks past the ornate gas lamp.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with illuminated electric company building and green warehouse doors

agents.ego_description: walking past the brightly lit electric building in heavy rain, approaching green industrial doors

entered.detail: large green painted arched warehouse doors with metal framing on the right building

segments.scene_description: Walking in heavy rain past the electric company building with its bright illuminated sign, the character moves along the cobblestone street. Large green arched warehouse doors appear on the right, and the wet ground reflects the warm lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cobblestone street leading to distant illuminated archway with parked carriage

agents.ego_description: walking down the wet cobblestone street toward the distant archway, passing a wooden carriage on the left

notable_agents.action: stationary wooden horse-drawn carriage parked on the left side of the street

entered.detail: old wooden horse-drawn carriage with large wheels parked on the left curb
illuminated stone archway structure visible at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the open cobblestone street toward a distant illuminated archway. A wooden horse carriage is parked on the left, and the green industrial doors recede into the distance on the right. The heavy rain continues to fall as the character approaches the arch.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, foggy alleyway that gradually opens into a rain-drenched industrial street. It begins with the character walking between a high stone wall and brick buildings, where dim gas lamps glow through a thick mist reflected on wet cobblestones. As the character passes through an iron gate, the scene expands into a wider thoroughfare where heavy rain begins to fall, bringing a bright electric company sign into view. The camera then tracks past the illuminated sign and large green arched warehouse doors, with the wet ground mirroring the warm city lights. Finally, the character continues down the open street past a parked wooden carriage, moving steadily toward a distant illuminated archway under the persistent downpour.
